title: PvP mods
description: This is a modpack that improves all types of PvP, whether visible or invisible, and is still good for PvP.
body:
Morinth PvP Modpack – 1.9+ Combat System

The Morinth PvP Modpack is specifically designed for the modern Minecraft 1.9+ combat system. The focus is on precise timing, clean movement, and strategic use of core combat mechanics such as attack cooldowns and shields.

This modpack is intended for players who compete seriously on Morinth and want to optimize their PvP experience both technically and visually.

Core Features
1. Optimized for 1.9+ Combat

Cooldown-based attacks at the center of combat

Effective shield usage

Support for crit timing and proper spacing

Clear visual hit feedback

2. Visual PvP Mods

The modpack intentionally uses visual quality-of-life mods, including:

Shield Status – Displays shield durability and status for better awareness during fights

Inventory HUD+ – Constant display of important inventory information (e.g., armor status, durability, active effects)

Extended status displays for effects and cooldown tracking

These mods improve visibility and awareness without altering core gameplay mechanics.

3. Performance & Clarity

FPS optimizations for stable fights

Reduced particle effects for better enemy tracking

Clean, streamlined interface

Minimized visual distractions

Purpose of the Modpack

The Morinth PvP Modpack supports a fair and skill-based competitive environment.

The primary focus is on:

Precise aim with Crosshair indicator

Clean movement

Efficient cooldown management with inventory hud+

Tactical decision-making

This is not a gameplay-altering advantage pack, but rather a visual and technical optimization designed for competitive 1.9+ PvP players on Morinth.
